title: Hotplug Handler Pattern
description: Shows how to write narrowly-scoped OpenWrt hotplug handlers that match explicit event contracts, publish minimal state, and hand off heavier work to the right control plane.
when_to_use: Use when writing or reviewing scripts under /etc/hotplug.d or package hotplug helpers, especially for iface, device, wireless, mount, DHCP, or time-validity events.
verification_basis: Local OpenWrt source review against checkout 56bf67d47406bd7c64cdfc6a8610032afe7094cf plus archive-backed mistake review from the OpenWrt mailing list corpus
